metadata.releaseNotes:
- Grouped positions
- Bug fixes and enhancements
metadata.description:
Zerodha Kite is our flagship trading app for the share market. We serve over 1.6 crore customers across our platform, with active traders placing 2+ crore orders every day.

Invest in everything

• All stocks on NSE and BSE stock exchanges - trade NSE stock and BSE stock securities.
• Equity shares, government bonds, T-bills, SDLs, and Sovereign Gold Bonds.
• Apply for IPO, buybacks, rights issues, and OFS - IPOs with instant application facility.
• Build wealth through systematic share trading and delivery-based investing.

Account and Finance Tools

• Open demat account integrated with CDSL depositories for share holding.
• Track and analyze your portfolio with detailed analytics and market trading insights.
• Share trading with instant pledge facility for additional margin - pledge shares for leverage.
• Financial reports and statements for all investments - track charges, profits, and performance.
• Gift shares, ETFs, and bonds to your loved ones from your demat account.

Why Kite?

reviews.author: dummy270918
reviews.title: Basic features missing
reviews.content: Never saw such a app where basic features are missing  where it doesn’t show how much %age change in stock today bring how much amount profit and loss for that day. Always show total percentage loss. Its crazy.. lots of improvement needed..

reviews.author: Shailaja Konduri
reviews.title: User friendly
reviews.content: I appreciate the kite app as it is user friendly and any lay man can also easily operate it… hats off to the makers

reviews.author: D e e p a k
reviews.title: Best trading app ever
reviews.content: Excellent platform for trading. Excellent support

reviews.author: Gaurav Savla
reviews.title: 2FAC auth is a joke
reviews.content:
It’s been several versions but the app developers have still not been able to solve the problem of 2 factor auth. You login with password and the app asks you whether you want to enable biometrics (Face ID). Upon enabling that it never sticks. Every time you log out or get logged out, it never recognizes the saved Face ID but prompts for password and keeps asking you questions on login to enable Face ID again. 

It’s a joke that this simple engineering problem has not been solved since 2 years now.

reviews.author: Paramns
reviews.title: Share transfer query
reviews.content: Appreciate the quick turnaround

reviews.author: Vjadi
reviews.title: Worst support
reviews.content: Not recommended

reviews.author: ingeniousinvestor
reviews.title: Chart view drawbacks
reviews.content: In the chart view, user should have an easy way to go through all the companies in the list similar to how TradingView does

reviews.author: SubbuRayudu
reviews.title: Stop triggering
reviews.content: Is it possible to add an option to the investors to stop triggering the orders when there are insufficient funds, it will help to keep those GTT orders intact for future, else investors has to create those GTT orders again which are rejected earlier, this may also lead the investors to lose the track of their portfolio.

reviews.author: prashantmarshal
reviews.title: User enemy
reviews.content: Basic things like sorting is such a pain.

reviews.author: saiKd
reviews.title: Screener and push notification can be improved
reviews.content: If you look at Robinhood usa stock app, It has custom screener option and push notification for Up & Down % push notifications of portfolio and alerts for earnings. If you implement this, you are a market beater with other apps

reviews.author: DT24x
reviews.title: Works well
reviews.content:
The app works very well. I have not faced any issues, crashes etc in the year plus duration I have been using it. The Zerodha platform itself has some complexities which roll over to the app as well.

One feature I would love is to divide my portfolio/holdings into multiple, smaller portfolios like core, short term etc. Right now it is a big list which becomes difficult to track once the holdings increase. I would also love ability to set alerts for a group of stocks (watchlist and holdings) instead of having to do one-by-one. Something like alert me of price of any of these goes up by 10%.

reviews.author: Gchoukse
reviews.title: Unable to login into the app this morning
reviews.content: I am trying to login but the app isn’t allowing me today.

reviews.author: nephsterr
reviews.title: Non-allotment of IPOs
reviews.content:
It’s been nearly around 30-40 applications I’ve applied the Bid for IPO’s (including SMEs) however none of them allotted yet. Can it be considered as a luck OR my account is not eligible for any IPOs?
I can help you with my account code if you’d like to view the reports.
Because applying for these many applications, there must be one should be assigned.

reviews.author: Utsuk Sharma
reviews.title: Works for me.
reviews.content:
Good for investors. Bad for traders. Some stocks not available to buy which are listed on exchange. Strange. 

Would have appreciated an option to add custom notes or star rating on stocks in watchlist.

reviews.author: Ravicbe
reviews.title: Font size and its color
reviews.content: When depth is pressed top portion becomes faded in iPhone app. Order execution screen is very dull and affects eye

reviews.author: rxs222
reviews.title: Efficient - quick response teams
reviews.content: Good provider - knowledgeable people

reviews.author: Jamalkodu
reviews.title: Always hangs
reviews.content: Goes under maintenance abruptly and hangs too often. Bad UX

reviews.author: Jellyuser
reviews.title: Chutiya app
reviews.content: Chutiya app not workinv

reviews.author: Social user1
reviews.title: Maintenance
reviews.content: I know maintenance is important, this app goes maintenance every week thats too sick

reviews.author: shshwjbaua
reviews.title: Worst application for trading
reviews.content:
They block trading for no reason and make you miss good trading opportunity for sure.
Third class app.

reviews.author: RK.2906
reviews.title: FaceID login doesn’t work
reviews.content: It gives option to enable faced login. Let the session expire. After that bring the app up again it tries faceid login which works but says session expired and bring back to initial login screen. Now you need to enter username and password again. Basically, now way to avoid entering username and password everyday. Expect such basic user functionality to work fine for a finance related app.

reviews.author: MCA321
reviews.title: MCA
reviews.content: App usage is simplified and easy to use

reviews.author: Vaibhavpkhanna
reviews.title: It’s user friendly.
reviews.content: It’s a great app for trading. Please make Iphone widget to view Portfolio and watchlist.

reviews.author: tbansal18
reviews.title: Crashing
reviews.content: It start crashing and even after deleting and re-installing the app does not work!

reviews.author: Diani123
reviews.title: Regarding New Update
reviews.content: Unable to add indicators, after 4 or 5 attempts only able to add. VWAP is not getting added, even after adding is shows n/a, please fix the about issues asap.

reviews.author: nickname1103
reviews.title: The interface is crap
reviews.content:
The interface seems like its designed and created by a 5 year old kid. 
Useless app if you want to trade options.

reviews.author: LRDY7
reviews.title: The app is so dumb does not even show current time
reviews.content: The app is so dumb does not even show current time

reviews.author: IosGarage
reviews.title: Worst UI and navigation.
reviews.content: Not sure why your app has such bad look n feel, confusing UI and navigation. For example:- no easy way to find out 52 weeks H/L. There are so many basic things missing.

reviews.author: saydh
reviews.title: Gtt feature is not available
reviews.content: I was not able to see the GTT button in the order page

reviews.author: T farid003 md
reviews.title: Add widget for ios
reviews.content: Add holding widget in ios

reviews.author: techoptimus
reviews.title: Missing ability to custom arrange stocks
reviews.content:
First I would like to cheer zerodha team for good work, various easy usable features are provided, I am saying in regards to ios version. 
However, I miss a feature to arrange portfolio stocks in custom order (drag and drop), if possible please provide this flexibility as well.

reviews.author: Gavara@123
reviews.title: Why can’t this app be made better?
reviews.content: This is good application, however it still needs to be stabilized - Can this be done Zerodha?

reviews.author: ipchrt
reviews.title: Charts not opening
reviews.content: Charts not supporting every time we open charts we need to restart the app.

reviews.author: pavanraju
reviews.title: App layout issues
reviews.content:
1. This app has an option to login using Face ID but when I close and open the app, it tries to login two or three times and fails. I have to enter username and password every time.

2. When you view a stock chart, the days range is displayed at the bottom right which is overlapping with iPhones back gesture. This should be moved to top.

This app needs lot of  UX improvements to make users interaction much easier, decrease number of clicks and simply the codes. 

I see so many codes to buy stocks like CNC and MIS. It would be great if some kind of tooltip is provided with straight forward message in it.

Hope this reaches and improves the app eventually.

reviews.author: ravikumar.cud
reviews.title: FaceID authentication fails
reviews.content: Every time I open the app, it does FaceID check twice but shows a black screen at the end.

reviews.author: tvrvymth
reviews.title: Zerodha
reviews.content: Very bad service Zerodha very bank if m in loss then all good the service is good but when i m in big profit and I canceling the trade but the service is week or issues m stop using zerodha. Very bad Zerodha very bad

reviews.author: kumar971
reviews.title: Drowning tool by trading view is not working
reviews.content: Fix this issue

reviews.author: Akshayagg
reviews.title: No more screener
reviews.content:
Before update I was using screener for trading 
After updating no more screener and not worth to open the account With Zeroda
It’s bad,I am a institution trader and without screener I will move to different platforms 
Due to no more screener

reviews.author: suyog55555
reviews.title: Drawing tools
reviews.content:
Drawing tools not working on ipad 8th gen
Plz fix this problem

reviews.author: suyash nigam
reviews.title: Cheated
reviews.content:
I invested 204 rupees to buy 24 shares at rupees 8.45. I sold the shares at rupees 8.50. In the brokerage calculator of zerodha, it shows profit of 1 rupee and some paisa. 
But after the sell my wallet balance remained 164. Where is my 41 rupees ? 
(Profit hone ke baad bhi loss !!)

reviews.author: killSwitch31
reviews.title: UI could have been better
reviews.content: The overall UI is quite complex and is not good at all. At least the equity graph UI could have been better. Possibly similar to what Robinhood or Fidelity has because thats the ones I currently use. Also, info about a stock can be presented much better. A button next to a abbreviation or a term for additional info on its meaning and detailed info would be better. I have recenty started to trade in Indian market and it seems quite hard to navigate and understand stuff on your app. Still I hear your app is better than other solutions available here.

reviews.author: honeyrachit
reviews.title: Worst App for trading
reviews.content:
World worst customer care service of Zerodha, when they need to open somebody’s account they call 5 times in a day without any gap but when it come to customer care they say they are facing covid issues and no body is bother about your money , no connection to customer care no response to customers.

I don’t have option to provide rating in - , else it would be -5 from my end

reviews.author: mgkdevi
reviews.title: Don’t go for zerodha
reviews.content: Never get trapped by opening an account with zerodha, most of the time u will not get your money credited after selling shares , if u are worried about your money there is no customer care agent available, minimum waiting time is 30 minutes ( better u appoint someone to make call and wait for zerodha, if u write to customer support u will get answers which is not even your problem, money is yours so invest with responsible brokers , don’t take risk

reviews.author: Bhushan Khairnar
reviews.title: Drawing tool support to ipad and Apple Pencil
reviews.content: Hi I like UI, but please add ipad drawing tool and Apple Pencil support to kite app, for only drawing tool we are using another app

reviews.author: lkjvloihugh bn
reviews.title: Bal ka app hai trend lines b draw nhi hota h(in trading view chart). Which make This app useless.
reviews.content: DONT go for this app especially in iOS

reviews.author: bhooooj
reviews.title: Real misleading
reviews.content: I sign up my account.After all procedure 300 deducted from my account but I didn’t receive any login id nor any confirmation email.This is pathetic experience and unprofessional process.There is not any option how to track your id or anything.

reviews.author: ganibhai007
reviews.title: Odd app
reviews.content: First ever app I saw that let the user create username and password in the end. For good luck sake let the user create it at the beginning so he/she can continue from where it is stopped

reviews.author: Suee94
reviews.title: App hangs too often
reviews.content: The kite app and Zerodha website hangs way too often. It stops executing orders at crucial times. This needs to be fixed asap as there are better brokers out there with lesser issues.

reviews.author: G0RAV
reviews.title: don’t update now  Worst bug fix
reviews.content: I can’t get charts to work also buying and selling in option gets error of wrong index or something like that

reviews.author: truth guy 3
reviews.title: Real cheat
reviews.content:
I tried to open an account with Zerodha I registered with my mobile number and after filled up my PAN Card details I was requested to pay RS 300 as opening charge
After paying Rs 300 with Google pay UPI
I haven’t received any mail confirmation of payment or any ID to login back. After I
refreshed the page the whole process of signing up started agin. But the amount of Rs 300 Debited from my bank account . I tried with the customer care and but such a real waste of time .
I am a existing Upstox user, I just want to try out there interface for intraday, but this is what happens when I try to open an account .
With all the payment proof and and receipt I am helpless .
Please share if any of you had similar issues

reviews.author: qqqaaa:&aassaaa.!
reviews.title: Stuck
reviews.content: Bakwash

reviews.author: ShriJad
reviews.title: I think I made a mistake by opening account in zerodha
reviews.content:
I am trying sell one of my share, I placed GTT on September 29 202. I got an email that transaction has been triggered but have not received any contract note till date. By rules I should have received it same day by eod. It’s been T+2 days and I don’t see any settlement yet. I created three tickets but no reply yet. 
I wonder why and how people are giving 5 star ratings to this app.

reviews.author: tanmoy_saha
reviews.title: Bug in positions option for ios
reviews.content: The sorting based on profit and loss isnt happening in the positions page

reviews.author: Vijay Ambre
reviews.title: CPR indicator not available on IOS
reviews.content:
While I can see CPR made available to Android , I don’t see it’s available for IOS users.  I still need to use my android phone over iPhone to use CPR. 

Plz update IOS app asap.

reviews.author: PradyK
reviews.title: Beautiful app
reviews.content: I don’t understand why this app has an avg rating of 3.7. I am sure this must be bots from other fintechs trying to bring down the zerodha popularity. This is the best app for investing. Can’t believe how they put so much into a mobile app and that too with such a great UI. Kudos to the team

reviews.author: 5thAveShopper
reviews.title: Basic.
reviews.content: While it gets the job done, kite leaves lot to be desired. It does not remember your drawings. That’s a major minus.

reviews.author: Abhi-k-tiwary
reviews.title: Full of Bug and performances issues
reviews.content: It has full of bug. The most irritating ones is the fund transfer. 70% times it ends up with error such as “network error”. Can’t blame the bank as it’s eventually gets funded

reviews.author: shak070
reviews.title: Tried Zerodha not upto mark.
reviews.content: Inconsistency with trade transactions and customer support. You will loose some key and timely trading through this app if you are beginner. Try but suggest to avoid for next 2-3 yrs  till this company get mature in trading and customer support.

reviews.author: Prince 111111
reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.content: I am unable to view or search contract in wash list .

reviews.author: Sujayakumar
reviews.title: We don't spend lot of time on review. But this one Deserves
reviews.content: Very good and lot of changes and good comminuted. I so please love this app. Good luck guys

reviews.author: doctorspeed.bharat
reviews.title: Login issues
reviews.content: Can’t we login if we are out of country from the app ?

reviews.author: Harsh Singhvi
reviews.title: Very unsatisfactory
reviews.content: The app interface is great, but it does not work whenever needed, it wont let me log in saying that connection timed out, retry again. Very disappointing

reviews.author: Pr@bh
reviews.title: Drawing tools not working
reviews.content: Please fix the problem with the crossline and the drawing tools (fibonnacci ,trendline etc)they are not working with ios 13.3.1 ipad

reviews.author: aashutoshpatil
reviews.title: Delayed chart
reviews.content: Chart update is slow. Some time fake which update day after

reviews.author: AbhRaw
reviews.title: Best Trading app by far!
reviews.content:
Normally I am too lazy to write a review about any app, but this App is dope! FaceID unlock was the final strike to blow my mind away! Even when it wasn’t available, I loved how a careful piece of copy was placed that informed the users why it is not available.

The UI as well as performance adds to the delight. Making the watchlist as tab is an amazing idea, I am sure other users would have similar thoughts. I just wish if some features of Sentinel could be extended to Kite. You guys are doing amazing job, keep challenging yourself as I don’t see anyone else close to you!

reviews.author: VijayPawar
reviews.title: Thanks for implementing dark mode.
reviews.content: Thanks for implementing dark mode. It looks awesome.

reviews.author: veemohan
reviews.title: Two apps
reviews.content: Why my present app is not getting updated with new feature... I am having two version of kit in my mobile.... strange

reviews.author: Jothikrrishna
reviews.title: IPad app?
reviews.content: Where is the iPad app. Removed old one but didnt replace it with new one???

reviews.author: Appleusr777
reviews.title: Looks good at new design
reviews.content: Huge changes in Kite 3. Looks good so far and easy to get the required details.

reviews.author: Phani K
reviews.title: Good starting point
reviews.content: I like the UI of this version and the charts. I believe there are a lot of aesthetics from Kite 2 that you can bring on here like font size which is a little too big and makes the screen look cluttered. Overall a good starting point.

reviews.author: Krishna0901
reviews.title: Loved it
reviews.content: Hopefully Zerodha server will work accordingly

reviews.author: Shivam dave
reviews.title: Awesome App
reviews.content: Fluid and fast UI .Please try to remove the swipe to buy/sell feature it’s quite finicky and make this app fo iPad ASAP. Cant wait to see it for iPad.
